rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Transcripts at ~/.claude/projects/<encoded-cwd>/ — referenced in maintainer push-back moves.
Sessions are the unit of work.
Source URL + type label — mandatory; maintainer-block scope.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line:140 — Ronacher's three-pattern: `[practitioner direct]` present, no URL. line:141 — Cherny's three verifier shapes: `[practitioner direct]` present, no URL. line:142 — Ramp Dojo 350-skill: `[practitioner direct]` present, no URL. line:143 — Intercom Tier 1/2/3 Curran: `[practitioner direct]` present, no URL in maintainer block. Per §1, no URL = [SOURCE NEEDED].
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Add source URLs for all four Frameworks-riffed-on entries: Ronacher (lucumr.pocoo.org), Cherny (practitioner X.com/blog), Ramp Dojo (x.com/geoffintech/status/2042002590758572377), Intercom (ideas.fin.ai/p/2x-nine-months-later). rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Source-verification maintainer block on any student-facing file with practitioner citations + specific numbers.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line:143 — Intercom Tier 1/2/3: specific metrics present (19.2% auto-approved / 14.6 min vs 75.8 min org median / 86% ≤20 lines / 500-person R&D) with named practitioner citation, but no `**Source verification — MUST DO before first cohort:**` section exists in the maintainer block.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Add source-verification section listing: URL for Intercom (ideas.fin.ai/p/2x-nine-months-later), each specific metric to verify, fallback framing if any metric fails at delivery, and freshness re-check note (6-month rule, source dated 2026-04-16).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Prompts live in the registry; module files reference by marker.
Artifact-realism — skills and paths must exist at this point in the student's environment.
Verification machinery needs a smoke-test before being trusted.
Cross-module artefact contracts — every produced artefact with stable identifier gets a contract row.
Per-phase failure mode + escape hatch — every forcing function names its dominant failure and one recovery move.
Per-exercise leap test — three observable Monday-morning outcomes.

platform_claims_checked.claim: AE101 delivery architecture: AE101 content folder + student's real repo, no training-dir state, no module-N/ folders
